name: Firecracker Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the chicken wings. Discard the tips or save for stock.
2. In a small bowl, mix together 1 tablespoon of KIKKOMAN Stir-Fry Sauce and dry sherry.
3. Coat the chicken pieces with the mixture, cover, and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, combine 1/3 cup of KIKKOMAN Stir-Fry Sauce, ginger root, garlic, red pepper, and water in a separate bowl.
5. In a large skillet over medium heat, brown the chicken on all sides in hot oil. Remove the chicken from the pan and discard the fat.
6. Pour the stir-fry sauce mixture into the same pan. Add the chicken back to the pan. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Sprinkle the chicken with chopped green onion. Cover and simmer for an additional 5 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
8. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch and water to make a slurry. Stir the mixture into the skillet, stirring constantly until the sauce boils and thickens.
9. Serve over cooked rice.
